data.title: The Fed’s Worst Nightmare? Inflation and Recession at the Same Time
data.description:
Jerome Powell warned that President Trump’s new tariffs could force the central bank into a difficult policy dilemma, juggling rising inflation and slowing growth.

The post The Fed’s Worst Nightmare? Inflation and Recession at the Same Time first appeared on Ecoinimist.

Babylon Labs saw an outflow of non-custodial staking, with 14,929 BTC sent to external addresses.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whales-withdraw-14929-btc-from-babylon-labs/

data.title: LBank will launch Hyperlane (HYPER) pre-market trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank announcement shows that LBank will launch Hyperlane (HYPER) pre-market trading at 16:30 (SGT) on April 17, and open the HYPER/USDT trading pair. It is reported that the delivery of HYPER pre-market trading will be carried out at the official opening. LBank will redeem HYPER pre-market trading and official trading tokens 1:1, and promise that the withdrawal time of HYPER will not be later than other centralized exchanges in the market.
At the same time, in order to protect the interests of users to the greatest extent, LBank launched a price protection limited activity to provide all-round protection for HYPER spot pre-market trading. When the pre-market trading ends, if the price of HYPER held by the user is lower than the average pre-market trading price of the industry market, the loss caused by the price drop will be subsidized by LBank, up to 50USDT, and the subsidy will be issued to the user's spot account in the form of USDT within 3 days after the end of the pre-market trading.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches LEGO, TIME, MT and Other Tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana and Base ecosystem's MEME tokens LEGO, TIME, mt, Defiant, Base is for everyone.
Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Bitcoin analysis: dollar correlation, state reserves, and 2025 projections
data.description:
Bitcoin navigates macro shifts: USD weakness, state reserve talks, and post-halving dynamics drive bullish momentum into 2025 and beyond. The article Bitcoin analysis: dollar correlation, state reserves, and 2025 projections was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/focus/background/bitcoin-analysis-dollar-correlation-state-reserves-and-2025-projections/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Bitcoin+analysis%3A+dollar+correlation%2C+state+reserves%2C+and+2025+projections

data.title: HTX DAO will disclose Q1 destruction data and the latest progress of the ecosystem in a live broadcast today
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, HTX DAO will hold a live broadcast on the theme of "HTX DAO 2025 Q1 Destruction Results Disclosure & Development Progress" at 19:30 today. At that time, HTX DAO core builders Huobi HTX Liuye, Helium, Huobi HTX Investment Research Team, HTX DAO Honorary Committee Member Maomao Sister, and Huobi HTX Contract Ambassador Big Cousin will be invited to attend and jointly interpret HTX DAO's first quarter destruction data, review the project construction results, and discuss in depth issues such as DAO governance and future development of the ecosystem. This event will be held simultaneously through Huobi Live and Huobi HTX Twitter Space, and there will be massive airdrops.

data.title: GSR deposited 4 million WCT to Binance 6 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, GSR recharged 4 million WCT (about 1.61 million US dollars) to Binance 6 hours ago. Today, 7 million WCT (about 3.46 million US dollars) has been deposited in Binance, and it is suspected to be a market maker of WCT.

data.title: deBridge governance token DBR airdrop is now open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the deBridge governance token DBR airdrop is now open for collection. Users who participate in the LFG launch and meet the airdrop conditions can collect DBR tokens on the deBridge Foundation official website. The deadline for airdrop collection is May 17th 16:00 (UTC+8).
